faqs.q: Do you treat both children and adults?
faqs.a: Yes. Shreshtha Dentistry is a multispeciality and paediatric dental practice. Our two doctors cover the full age spectrum — from a child's first dental visit through to advanced cosmetic and restorative work for adults.

faqs.q: How do I book an appointment?
faqs.a: You can book through the form on this site, call us directly, or send a WhatsApp message. We typically confirm within an hour during clinic hours and offer same-day slots for emergencies.

Situated in one of Chennai's most well-connected neighbourhoods, our clinic can be reached conveniently by car, metro, bus, or auto. We are just a short drive from Pondy Bazaar, Panagal Park, and T. Nagar Bus Terminus, making your visit hassle-free. 
Getting Here:
• By Metro: Easily accessible from nearby Chennai Metro stations.
• By Bus: Multiple MTC bus routes connect directly to T. Nagar.
• By Car: Convenient road access with parking options.
• By Auto/Cab: Simply search for "Shreshtha Dentistry, T. Nagar" on Google Maps for turn-by-turn navigation.
We are open Monday to Satuday,11:00 AM to 8:30 PM. On Sundays from 11:00 AM to 3:00 PM.

faqs.q: Do you offer emergency dental care?
faqs.a: Yes — we keep same-day slots available for dental trauma, severe pain, and post-op concerns. Call or WhatsApp us first so we can guide you on what to do before you arrive.

Modern dentistry is far gentler than most people expect. We use local anaesthesia for any invasive procedure, and our paediatric protocols include behaviour-management techniques designed specifically for anxious children.

We give you a written treatment plan with itemised costs before any work begins. There are no hidden charges. Where multiple options exist, we'll explain trade-offs honestly so you can choose what fits your budget.
We provide all documentation needed for reimbursement claims with most major insurance providers. Reach out to us with your provider's name and we'll guide you through the process.
